message:
feat(core,scripts): harden pthread thread lifecycle and expand CI/E2E infrastructure

- Extend pthread thread.rs with improved stack management, guard page
  handling, and thread lifecycle robustness (+397 lines)
- Add new syscall wrappers in syscall/mod.rs for thread support
- Major refactor of check_e2e_suite.sh and e2e_suite.sh for broader
  E2E coverage and structured reporting
- Add check_replacement_guard.sh for replacement validation
- Expand ci.sh with additional gate checks
- Refactor perf_gate.sh for more granular performance regression detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
